meta.title: Explore Canvas, OpenAI’s latest interface in this new short course
meta.description:
Enroll now: https://bit.ly/3VaJG1M

We saw your interest in the ChatGPT Prompt Engineering for Developers course and thought you’d love what’s next. OpenAI Canvas, a new workspace available on ChatGPT, furthers your creative collaboration with AI.

In this free video-only short course, Collaborative Writing and Coding with OpenAI Canvas, you’ll watch, explore, and learn how to:

- Use a side-by-side workspace to brainstorm, refine, and edit text and code with AI in real-time.
- Build practical applications like creating game apps, generating Python code from plot screenshots, and designing SQL databases from architecture images.
- Unlock new possibilities for debugging, targeted editing, and automating workflows.
- Learn how GPT-4o powers these advanced tools and functionalities.

Whether you’re looking to expand your coding toolkit or enhance your writing, OpenAI Canvas is the perfect next step in your AI journey.

Learn more: https://bit.ly/3VaJG1M
